list.title: Prescriptions
list.description: Manage prescriptions linked to patient medical records.
list.resultsDescription: Select a patient and medical record to review prescriptions.

filters.title: Medical record selection
filters.description: Choose a patient and one of their medical records before managing prescriptions.

form.description: Fill in the prescription details below.

states.selectPatientDescription: Choose a patient above to load their medical records.
states.selectRecordDescription: Choose a medical record to review and manage prescriptions.
states.emptyDescription: This medical record does not have any prescriptions yet.
states.emptyRecordsDescription: Create a medical record before adding prescriptions.
states.unauthorizedDescription: Your session is not authorized for this request.
states.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this resource.
states.writeForbiddenDescription: Only doctors and admins can create or edit prescriptions.
states.errorDescription: We could not load prescription data.

errors.list: We could not load the prescriptions list.
errors.save: We could not save the prescription.
errors.delete: We could not delete the prescription.
errors.patients: We could not load patient options.
errors.records: We could not load medical record options.
errors.invalidData: Please check the prescription details and try again.
errors.notFound: The prescription or medical record could not be found.
errors.writeForbidden: You do not have permission to change prescriptions.
